news.summary: Wintrust Financial Corporation has announced the redemption of its preferred stocks - all 5,000,000 shares of Series D Preferred Stock and all 11,500 shares of Series E Preferred Stock, along with their corresponding depositary shares - on July 15, 2025. The redemption price is $25.00 per share for Series D and $25,000 per share for Series E (or $25.00 per Depositary Share). These redemptions will be funded using the net proceeds from the public offering of depositary shares of Series F Preferred Stock, completed on May 22, 2025. The redemptions aim to streamline the company's capital structure.
news.headline: Wintrust Financial Corp to redeem 5M shares of Series D Preferred Stock for $25 each, and 11.5K shares of Series E for $25K each on July 15; Funded from proceeds of public offering.

news.summary: A new report reveals that the global economy is expected to grow by 4.3% in 2021, a significant increase compared to the 3.5% growth in 2020. The recovery is driven by strong performance in advanced economies, with the United States and China leading the way with projected growth rates of 6.5% and 8.1% respectively. Emerging markets are also seeing positive growth, with India expected to grow by 12.5% and Brazil by 3.7%. However, the report cautions about the uneven distribution of vaccines and the potential for new COVID-19 variants to pose risks to the economic outlook. Overall, the global economy is showing signs of recovery but challenges remain as countries work towards a more sustainable and inclusive economic recovery post-pandemic.
news.headline: Stocks fall, oil climbs as investors assess repercussions amid market fluctuations.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, IREN Limited (NASDAQ: IREN) (ACN 629 842 799) revealed the completion of its private offering, raising $550 million through the issuance of 3.50% convertible senior notes due 2029. The notes were offered to qualified institutional buyers in accordance with Rule 144A under the Securities Act of 1933.
news.headline: IREN closed a $550 million convertible notes offering to institutional buyers. The notes are due in 2029.

news.summary: On June 10, 2025, Nurix Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: NRIX) in San Francisco, a biopharmaceutical company focusing on targeted protein degradation medicines for cancer and inflammatory diseases, awarded seventeen new employees with grants. These inducement awards were part of the company's 2024 Equity Inducement Plan, approved by the Compensation Committee of Nurix’s Board of Directors following Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). This move is aimed at enhancing treatment options, with Nurix's innovative drug design for patient benefits.
news.headline: Nurix Therapeutics granted awards to 17 new employees on June 10, 2025, under the 2024 Equity Inducement Plan.

news.summary: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc., a leading provider of semiconductor-based power electronics solutions, headquartered in Kirkland, Wash., declared a quarterly dividend of $1.56 per common share for the second quarter of 2025. This dividend will be disbursed to all stockholders of record by June 30, 2025, and is scheduled for payment on July 15, 2025. MPWR, traded on Nasdaq, caters to a global market with its high-performance products.
news.headline: Monolithic Power Systems declares $1.56 Q2 dividend per common share, payable on July 15, 2025.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, Canterbury Park Holding Corporation (NASDAQ: CPHC) disclosed its latest financial move. The company's Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend of $0.07 per share. This dividend will be disbursed on July 14, 2025, to stockholders who are officially registered by June 30, 2025. The yearly equivalent of this quarterly dividend amounts to $0.28 per common share.
news.headline: Canterbury Park Holding Corp declares $0.07 quarterly cash dividend, $0.28 annually, payable July 14, record on June 30.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global unemployment rate has reached 5.7%, with approximately 190 million people worldwide currently unemployed. The study also highlights that youth unemployment remains a significant issue, with 63 million young individuals currently seeking employment. Additionally, the report shows that the COVID-19 pandemic has had a detrimental impact on job markets, pushing many individuals out of work. The data underscores the urgent need for targeted interventions and support to address the growing unemployment crisis and its repercussions.

news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) continues to soar, with JPMorgan predicting further growth for crypto miners. Analyst Reginald L. Smith has raised price targets for key mining stocks, emphasizing improved mining profitability and higher spot BTC assumptions. CleanSpark Inc (CLSK) leads the way with a possible 44% upside, followed closely by Riot Platforms Inc (RIOT) and MARA Holdings Inc (MARA) with a 37% and 20% potential increase, respectively. IREN Ltd (IREN) also shows promise with an 18% possible upside, according to Smith's analysis. For the complete report, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bitcoin miners like CleanSpark, Riot, and MARA could see up to 44% upside with higher BTC prices. Analyst boosts price targets.

news.summary: Houston American Energy Corp. (NYSE American: HUSA) in Houston, TX, disclosed on June 13, 2025, that it noticed abnormal trading activity in its common stock on the NYSE on June 12 and 13, 2025. The company, in accordance with Section 401(d) of the NYSE Company Guide, issued a press release regarding this matter. Despite conducting investigations, the company has been unable to determine if any corrective measures are necessary at this point. It was emphasized that there have been no significant developments in the company's operations or undisclosed information that could explain the unusual market behavior.
news.headline: Houston American Energy Corp. responds to unusual trading in common stock on NYSE American on June 12-13, 2025. No new developments or reasons found.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that global carbon dioxide emissions have reached a new record high of 33.1 billion metric tons in 2019. This marks a 0.6% increase from the previous year's levels. The United States, China, and India are the top three emitters, contributing to more than half of the total emissions. The report also highlights that despite efforts to reduce emissions, the world is still far from meeting the targets set by the Paris Agreement to limit global warming. The findings emphasize the urgent need for more significant and immediate actions to combat climate change.

news.summary: Launching its inaugural location in Omaha's emerging downtown district, The Root, a coworking and hospitality brand hailing from Oklahoma, is introducing The Root - Builders. Within the walls of the 1501 Mike Fahey building, over 25,000 square feet has been innovatively reimagined to offer the community a distinctive hub for flexible coworking, offices, meeting rooms, and event space. This establishment signifies The Root's expansion, being the fourth location in its portfolio and the second venture beyond the borders of Oklahoma.
news.headline: "The Root Coworking opens 4th location in downtown Omaha on June 23rd, with 25,000 sq ft space in Builders District."

news.summary: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in the last decade. The total number of employed individuals has increased by 200,000, reaching a record high of 30.5 million. However, there are concerns about the underemployment rate, which remains at 8.9%. Furthermore, the report highlights a decrease in the youth unemployment rate to 11.3%. Overall, the labor market seems to be improving, with more people finding jobs, but there is still room for progress in addressing underemployment issues.

news.summary: In Trieste, Italy, illycaffè, a prominent sustainable coffee company, has announced the continuation of its partnership with The World's 50 Best Restaurants for the 2025 edition. The ranking is known for honoring culinary excellence worldwide. This collaboration signifies the commitment of illycaffè to supporting the food industry.
news.headline: illycaffè partners with The World's 50 Best Restaurants 2025 to celebrate fine dining.Renews partnership for 2025 edition.

news.summary: In a special ceremony at the shipyard in Pascagoula, Mississippi on June 12, 2025, HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding division recognized the 2025 class of master shipbuilders. These distinguished employees, who are part of an exclusive group, have completed an impressive 40 years of uninterrupted service with the company. They have played a crucial role in constructing the country's cutting-edge naval vessels, contributing significantly to national security efforts, and serving as mentors for the upcoming generation of shipbuilders. The ceremony commemorating their dedication and expertise was a tribute to their commitment to excellence in shipbuilding and supporting vital defense projects.
news.headline: HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding honored 2025 class of master shipbuilders for 40 years of service on June 12.
